member.name: T:TenantIsolation.Caching.ICacheProvider
member.summary: In-memory cache provider with TTL support. Implements sliding expiration and automatic cleanup. Used as fallback when distributed cache is unavailable.

member.name: T:TenantIsolation.Caching.MemoryCacheProvider
member.summary: In-memory implementation of cache provider. Thread-safe using ConcurrentDictionary; all operations complete synchronously so every public method returns a pre-completed ValueTask with zero allocations.

member.summary: Add hash of complex object to key. Useful for caching with parameter-dependent keys.

member.name: M:TenantIsolation.Caching.CacheKeyBuilder.Build
member.summary: Build final cache key. Uses ArrayPool to avoid a temporary List allocation when concatenating prefix and segments.

member.summary: Ordered list of tenant resolution strategies to try, in priority order. First successful strategy will be used to resolve the tenant.

member.summary: Default tenant ID to use when Default strategy is selected. If null, resolution will fail when no other strategy succeeds.

member.summary: Default tenant slug to use when Default strategy is selected. If null, resolution will fail when no other strategy succeeds.

member.summary: Whether to throw an exception when tenant resolution fails. When false, returns null instead of throwing TenantNotResolvedException.

member.summary: Configuration options for tenant usage metering and quota enforcement.

member.name: P:TenantIsolation.Configuration.UsageMeteringOptions.WarningThresholdPercent
member.summary: Percentage of quota consumption at which a warning is logged. Must be between 1 and 100. Defaults to 80.

member.name: P:TenantIsolation.Configuration.UsageMeteringOptions.DefaultPeriod
member.summary: Default billing period applied to new usage records when not specified explicitly. Defaults to .

member.name: P:TenantIsolation.Configuration.UsageMeteringOptions.ThrowOnQuotaExceeded
member.summary: When true, calls to that push a tenant over their quota also throw immediately, combining recording and enforcement in a single step. Defaults to false.

member.name: P:TenantIsolation.Configuration.UsageMeteringOptions.MaxMetricsPerTenant
member.summary: Maximum number of distinct metric keys tracked per tenant before older entries are pruned. Set to 0 to disable pruning. Defaults to 500.

member.name: M:TenantIsolation.Data.TenantDbContextFactory.ApplyTenantQueryFilters(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptionsBuilder,System.Guid)
member.summary: Applies global query filters for tenant isolation based on the provided tenant ID. This method is left as a placeholder for where dynamic query filters might be applied if a custom IModelCacheKeyFactory were implemented. For this fix, dynamic filtering is not directly applied here, relying on other mechanisms (e.g., explicit WHERE clauses).

member.name: M:TenantIsolation.Utilities.StringExtensions.NonWordCharsRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[^\\w\\s-]
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [^\-\w\s].

member.name: M:TenantIsolation.Utilities.StringExtensions.LeadingTrailingDashesRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^-+|-+$

○ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match '-' atomically at least once.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match '-' atomically at least once.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.
